_meta.description: Backend test infrastructure, seeds, Docker config, and module coverage audit

fixtures.factories.ts: Creates test objects: createTestDealer (argon2id hashed), createTestBeneficiary, createTestTransaction

conceptNodes.label: Test Architecture — Fixture Factory + Unit/Integration Split
conceptNodes.description: Tests follow a fixture-factory pattern (argon2id password hashing for dealers, factory functions for beneficiaries/transactions) with a clear split between unit tests (7 files: circuit-breaker, encrypt, hash, otp, pagination, sync helpers) and integration tests (7 files: audit, auth, commission, finance, internal-sync, sync, transaction). Setup suppresses Redis version warnings.

conceptNodes.label: Module Architecture — 21 Business Domains, Consistent Layering
conceptNodes.description: The backend is organized into 21 modules under src/modules/. Each module follows a consistent pattern: controller, routes, service, and schema files. Some modules extend with sub-resources (e.g., mdm.monthly.*). No 'icds' module exists — this is a notable gap if ICDS integration is expected.

conceptNodes.label: Docker Infrastructure — 3-Profile Setup (Dev, Prod, Worker)
conceptNodes.description: Three Dockerfiles serve distinct purposes: (1) Dockerfile — multi-stage production build on node:22-alpine with unprivileged 'efps' user, (2) Dockerfile.dev — hot-reload dev with tsx/nodemon, (3) Dockerfile.worker — Playwright-based automation worker on jammy with chromium, separate build stage on bookworm. docker-compose.yml wires app + postgres:16-alpine + redis:7-alpine with health checks and dev volume mounting.

conceptNodes.label: Seed Strategy — Empty Seeds Directory
conceptNodes.description: The seeds directory at efps-backend/src/database/seeds/ is empty. This suggests seeding is handled externally (migration-based, API-driven setup, or script-based) rather than through committed seed files.

conceptNodes.label: Missing Domain — ICDS Module Not Found
conceptNodes.description: The ICDS (Integrated Child Development Services) domain module does not exist under src/modules/. If ICDS integration is part of the eFPS domain model, this module would need to be created, following the established controller/routes/service/schema pattern.

conceptNodes.label: Analysis Exclusions — Unconfigured
conceptNodes.description: The .understandignore file exists but contains only commented-out patterns. No test files or directories are currently excluded from analysis. The config.json sets outputLanguage to 'en' with no other overrides.
